title: neea urophylla
intro: Neea urophylla, also known as the 'red-berried Neea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neea urophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Neea urophylla can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
